chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 528 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.2200/2023 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 04.05.2023 Petitioner is present in person. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Niaz Hussain Maitlo, Advocate files power on behalf of respondent No.3-University, which is taken on record. It is case of the petitioner that he obtained admission in Master of Arts (Economics) in the year 2021, which was subsequently cancelled by the respondents-University; hence, he seeks restoration of his admission. Besides, he has made multiple prayers including declaring the act of respondents for holding additional charges as null and void; direction to respondents to return the amount received during holding of additional charges; appointment of an officer for conducting enquiry regarding illegal acts of the respondents and taking action against the Vice Chancellor of the University. The petitioner has failed to file any documentary evidence showing that he was ever admitted in Master of Arts (Economics) in the year 2021. Furthermore, it is case of the petitioner that his admission was cancelled in the year 2021; hence, this petition badly suffers from laches involved in the petition. So far the other prayers are concerned, the same being vague are not entertainable; hence, this petition being devoid of merits is dismissed accordingly along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
